title: Spicy Turkish Adana Kebap
description: A flavorful Turkish kebap dish made with crispy hard taco shells, rice, and spiced lamb, perfect for a quick and delicious meal.
instructions: Combine ground lamb, onion, garlic, paprika, cumin, cayenne pepper, salt, and black pepper in a large bowl and mix well.
Heat olive oil in a large pan over medium-high heat.
Add the lamb mixture to the pan and cook, breaking it up with a spoon, until browned, about 5 minutes.
Add the rice to the pan and stir to combine with the lamb mixture.
Cook for 2-3 minutes, stirring constantly, until the rice is lightly toasted.
Add 2 cups of water to the pan and bring to a boil.
Reduce heat to low, cover, and simmer for 15-20 minutes, or until the water is absorbed and the rice is tender.
While the rice is cooking, preheat a grill or grill pan to medium-high heat.
Cook the hard taco shells according to the package instructions.
To assemble the kebaps, place a portion of the lamb and rice mixture onto the bottom of each taco shell, followed by a sprinkle of fresh parsley.
